{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320165127FD1F3A49A5383F9CCF83\"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7440874254584447768","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"评论好少啊，还是值得一看的，基本上算是一个笼统的大纲，细节不多，只是记录一些大事件或者人物的简略评价"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732467448,"group_id":"7313170394595200019","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看多了小说，想试试自己写","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzvqNwoDlR4ByBbipYI2g9YtMJI+UAtRtiBRb+SkrGGs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776533184\u0026x-signature=RgoLQBEbWHhse2wGyPFgozOziRs%3D","user_id":"3808337103954247","user_name":"呜啦啦121"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3808337103954247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7313170394595200019","book_info":{"abstract":"《古代历史著名人物》一书，是一部深度挖掘与精彩描绘古代华夏璀璨群星的力作。作者以生动细腻的笔触，详实严谨的史料，将秦始皇的雄才大略、汉武帝的文治武功、诸葛亮的智谋深远等众多历史人物的风采跃然纸上。全书跨越时空，展现了一幕幕波澜壮阔的历史画卷，使读者既能领略到古人的智慧与人格魅力，又能深刻理解中华民族传统文化的精神内核。此书不仅是一部人物传记，更是一部鲜活的历史教科书，值得每一位热爱历史、渴望从历史中汲取智慧的读者品读收藏。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2f948f8d4b89eb795e6f30ff235d5dab","author":"枫之羽","author_id":"","book_id":"7313170394595200019","book_name":"古代历史著名人物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2027人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7313170504662123027","read_count":"2027","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4169711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"1458","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o93b8c957af24936bd8bafe004340afde~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779180687\u0026x-signature=H8AI%2BifkoNu9yEjqG7aq2raegjQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108470694631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320165127FD1F3A49A5383F9CCF83\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":651},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7423788262328959768","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者一定非常热爱历史热爱生活  连续更新这么多天实在辛苦了！每天都读一点感觉很有收获"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728489226,"group_id":"7313170394595200019","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阴暗扭曲发疯爬行大学生","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3bZjERphvdhDrjoGCKkwQd3CZ5rHkUqET3DdG6/c5NE","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7541ad3c975c416d9b66505e46b77277~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776528393\u0026x-signature=PhCUHKeagDIFOScLLy3XF70wNTs%3D","user_id":"2201688538878503","user_name":"藏鹤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2201688538878503","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7313170394595200019","book_info":{"abstract":"《古代历史著名人物》一书，是一部深度挖掘与精彩描绘古代华夏璀璨群星的力作。作者以生动细腻的笔触，详实严谨的史料，将秦始皇的雄才大略、汉武帝的文治武功、诸葛亮的智谋深远等众多历史人物的风采跃然纸上。全书跨越时空，展现了一幕幕波澜壮阔的历史画卷，使读者既能领略到古人的智慧与人格魅力，又能深刻理解中华民族传统文化的精神内核。此书不仅是一部人物传记，更是一部鲜活的历史教科书，值得每一位热爱历史、渴望从历史中汲取智慧的读者品读收藏。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2f948f8d4b89eb795e6f30ff235d5dab","author":"枫之羽","author_id":"","book_id":"7313170394595200019","book_name":"古代历史著名人物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2027人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7313170504662123027","read_count":"2027","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4169711"},"relate_post_id":"","rela
